name: ireview
description: Universal AI-to-AI code review. Any model reviews your code — DeepSeek, GPT, Gemini, Llama, or any OpenAI-compatible API. Zero dependencies, zero CLI installs. Just set your API key and model.

hooks.prompt: iReview active. Read .ireview.json if it exists (model, api_key, base_url, focus, auto_review). If no config file, check environment variables: IREVIEW_MODEL, IREVIEW_API_KEY, IREVIEW_BASE_URL. If neither exists, tell user: 'iReview needs a config. Run: echo '{"model":"deepseek/deepseek-chat","api_key":"YOUR_KEY","base_url":"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1","focus":["bugs","security"],"auto_review":false}' > .ireview.json' Do NOT mention this setup if config already exists. Just silently load it.

iReview Stop gate. Check .ireview.json — if auto_review is false or config missing, skip silently. If auto_review is true: 1) Run 'git diff HEAD' to get changed files. If no changes, skip. 2) Read the iReview skill from skills/ireview/SKILL.md for review protocol. 3) Send the diff to the configured model via curl to base_url/chat/completions with the api_key. System prompt: 'You are a code reviewer. Review this diff. Report only real bugs, security issues, and logic errors. Ignore style. Be concise. If no issues found, respond with exactly: LGTM'. 4) If response is 'LGTM', allow stop. If issues found, report them and suggest fixes before stopping.
